title: ayenia aurantiaca
intro: Ayenia aurantiaca is a plant species in the family Malpighiaceae, commonly known as the Orange-eyed Ayenia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Ayenia aurantiaca include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues, making it a valuable resource in herbal medicine. Ayenia aurantiaca can be prepared into herbal remedies through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
